item.ptxt: When the automatic transaxle is replaced, the transaxle's compensation code must be input into the TCM (Proceed to step 1).
When the TCM is replaced, the existing transaxle compensation codes must be input into the new TCM (Proceed to step 2).

atten3.ptxt: Transaxle compensation codes are unique, 60-digit alphanumeric values printed on the QR label. If an incorrect transaxle compensation code is input into the TCM, shift shock may occur.

s2.ptxt: Record the transmission compensation code specified on the QR label.

atten4.ptxt: The transaxle compensation code is imprinted on the QR label.

s2.ptxt: Shift the shift lever to N or P position.
Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Enter the menu items in this order: DIAGNOSIS / OBD/MOBD / ECT / AT CODE UTILITY.

s3.ptxt: Manually input the transaxle compensation code. The code is a 60-digit alphanumeric value imprinted on the QR label.

s2.ptxt: Check that the compensation code displayed on the screen is correct by comparing it with the 60-digit alphanumeric value on the QR label.

atten3.ptxt: If an incorrect transaxle compensation code is input into the TCM, shift shock will occur.

atten4.ptxt: Input letters by operating the keys from 0 to 5 while pressing the * key.

s2.ptxt: Press "ENTER" to set the compensation code to the TCM.

item.ptxt: If the registration process fails, the compensation code may be incorrect. Check the compensation code again.

If the attempted compensation code is correct, a problem with the wire harness or a bad connection with the DLC3 may cause a registration failure. Check the wire harness and the DLC3 connection. If no problem is found, the TCM may be malfunctioning. Check the TCM and repeat this operation.

atten3.ptxt: Transaxle compensation codes are 60-digit alphanumeric values imprinted on the QR label. If an incorrect transaxle compensation code is input into the TCM, shift shock may occur.

atten4.ptxt: The following operation is available for use with TCMs that can transmit the registered transaxle compensation code to the intelligent tester.

s2.ptxt: Shift the shift lever to N or P position.
Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.

atten4.ptxt: The transaxle compensation code is imprinted on the QR label.

s3.ptxt: Enter the menu items in this order: DIAGNOSIS / OBD/MOBD / ECT / AT CODE UTILITY.

atten3.ptxt: Do not use the code specified on the transaxle QR label even if the transmission compensation code cannot be read using the intelligent tester. The code printed on an in-service transaxle may not match its current characteristics. Replace the TCM with a new one and perform a road test to allow the TCM to learn.

s3.ptxt: Enter the menu items in this order: DIAGNOSIS / OBD/MOBD / ECT / AT CODE UTILITY.
